slices.title: Monorepo bootstrap
dod: initial CI shape is documented or configured

slices.title: Postgres schema v1 and drizzle migrations
dod: db reset and migrate path exists
core schema types and DB schema agree

slices.title: Local workspace FS watcher and 2-phase write
dod: interleaved human and agent edits keep sha256 consistent

slices.title: DraftAgent
dod: empty doc creates outline and draft

slices.title: Desktop shell catch-up: first runnable desktop build
dod: Tauri 2 shell and React renderer scaffolded under packages/desktop with src-tauri
pnpm --filter @weki/desktop dev opens an empty Tauri window on macOS or Windows
Opening an empty workspace creates .weki/ and spawns agent-server as a sub-process
End-to-end /draft flow from slash menu to approved patch to disk completes by hand (PRD §13.7.3 nine steps)
Two-phase write parity holds: approved patch writes to disk with matching body_sha256
External edits propagate to renderer within five seconds via S-03 watcher
All eight IPC commands and events from PRD §13.7.4 are registered and tested
Rust dependency whitelist from PRD §9.3 is respected and pnpm lint:deps passes
packages/desktop/README.md documents prerequisites, dev run, and five troubleshooting entries

slices.title: IngestAgent and import system operation
dod: one raw fans out to 3-10 nodes on average

slices.title: CurateAgent, IA ops, and manual page management
dod: curate golden set includes failure modes
manual page/folder management supports create, rename, move, duplicate, archive/delete, restore, and tag/kind edits

slices.title: System ops: find, diff, blame, revert, lint
dod: diff and blame are line accurate

slices.title: Markdown LSP diagnostics and analyze/edit mode
dod: new workspace defaults to analyze mode
write commands are blocked in analyze mode

slices.title: Solo session identity and dev act-as toggle
dod: Solo mode is the default for newly opened workspaces with no login UI
agent-server middleware sets app.user_id from a single local user identity per session and existing RLS policies remain enforced
Local user identity is provisioned once per workspace and persisted under .weki/user.json with a stable UUID
Single Solo user behaves as editor for §11.4.1 default policies (self-patch auto-approve, IA ops still queue)
Dev-only act-as mechanism (WEKI_DEV_AS_ROLE env var or Tauri dev menu) lets a developer impersonate reader/editor/admin/owner against RLS
Production builds strip the act-as path and verify it via a build-time guard test
Audit log records the active user_id (Solo identity or impersonated role) on every write decision

slices.title: Team and Enterprise multi-user mode
dod: Team mode toggle from Solo without data migration (single Solo user becomes the first owner)
OAuth login (GitHub or Google) for Team mode
SAML 2.0 / OIDC and SCIM provisioning for Enterprise mode
Member management UI (invite, role change, remove) gated by owner role
reader/editor/admin/owner permissions match the §11.3 matrix in integration tests
Write denial is audited and surfaced in audit_log
IP allowlist and session policy controls are configurable in Enterprise mode
Audit export command works for admin role

slices.title: Web app v1 read-mostly
dod: web reads same workspace through server API
web can ask/read without desktop-only assumptions
desktop and web share editor primitives where practical

slices.title: Extension infra T1 and T2
dod: non-technical skill addition can be demonstrated

slices.title: Extension infra T3 plugin SDK
dod: unsigned plugin developer mode is explicit

slices.title: Extension infra T4 MCP host
dod: tool calls are traced and audited with redaction

slices.title: Triples graph future toggle
dod: triple table/API can be toggled experimentally
graph UI degrades cleanly without triples

slices.title: Eval suite and cost dashboard
dod: core and system eval suites meet GA distribution
budget alerts and hard stop are configurable

slices.title: Launch first-party extension agents
dod: at least eight first-party extension agents are marketplace-ready
each uses T2 or T3 format
each has help examples and basic eval or smoke test
